since_last: 71% of 100 AI names green; Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads +4.79%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 71% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.38% · BTC +4.40% · Gold +1.59% · Nasdaq100 +1.10%. 71% of 100 AI names are green — a broad bid. Chip Equipment & AI Hardware is doing the heavy lifting at +4.79%.

cards.headline: Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads, Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at +4.79%; weakest is Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical at -1.08%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: SKHY is the standout at +27.47%
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -1.44% at $137.13
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -1.44% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
